message:
refactor(session/model): add set_label, remove theme coupling, enable
AssistantMessageEvent deserialization

src/session.rs:
- Add set_label() implementation on SessionHandle that locks session
  and calls session.add_label() for the given entry ID
- Remove resolve_console_theme() function (~29 lines) - theme resolution
  is now handled by the resource layer, not session selection
- Replace PiConsole::new_with_theme(theme) with PiConsole::new() in
  select_session()
- Remove unused rich_rust::Theme import

src/model.rs:
- Add Deserialize to AssistantMessageEvent derive, enabling round-trip
  serialization of streaming events (needed for VCR test playback and
  extension event forwarding)

src/agent.rs:
- Minor formatting fix: add braces around push_follow_up and
  push_steering match arms in AgentSessionHostActions
- Add test: extension_send_message_persists_custom_message_entry
  verifying that pi.sendMessage() from an extension after an await
  persists the custom entry in the session

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
